description_long: This is a compact, modern filing cabinet with a dark brown rectangular body and four light-colored legs. The cabinet features a single, large front drawer with a recessed handle, designed for easy access. On the back, two folders or dividers—one blue and one gray—are visible, suggesting internal organization for documents. The top surface is flat and sturdy, suitable for placing small office items. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible label holders or lock mechanisms. The materials appear to be primarily wood or engineered wood, with possible metal or plastic components for the legs and internal structure.
description: A modern, dark brown filing cabinet with a single large drawer, recessed handle, and visible internal dividers. It stands on four light-colored legs and has a flat, sturdy top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large drawer with a recessed handle and the cabinet's clean, minimalist face.
description_view_1: Rear view revealing two internal dividers or folders—one blue, one gray—protruding above the back edge.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the solid, unadorned side panel and a glimpse of the internal dividers.
description_view_3: Top-down view highlighting the flat, smooth surface and the tops of the internal dividers at the back.
